title: Titan Series Premium Double-Braced Steel Folding Chair - Grey
features: The Titan Series Steel Folding Chair offers a dependable, no-nonsense seating solution designed for strength, practicality, and everyday use.
Constructed with a heavy-duty steel frame and a double bracing system, it delivers excellent stability while remaining lightweight and easy to handle.
The smooth, contoured steel seat and back provide lasting comfort and are easy to clean, making this chair ideal for high-turnover environments.
Perfect for events, schools, meeting spaces, and rental operations, this chair is built to withstand frequent use while maintaining a clean, professional appearance.
The foldable design allows for efficient storage and quick setup, making it a smart, durable choice for any setting where reliability matters.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
